channel.title: GitHub Inno Setup Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Inno Setup in GitHub

item.title: ManlyMarco/KK-HF_Patch
item.description: Automatically translate, uncensor and update Koikatu! and Koikatsu Party!

item.title: krypto5863/COM-Modular-Installer
item.description: This repo is dedicated to the COM Modular Installer. An installer built in Inno and using a C# library to extend functions.

item.title: AlanFinotty/AAFDCHDriverMod
item.description: Realtek Audio Driver Mods by Alan Finotty

item.title: qmk/qmk_distro_msys
item.description: A Windows one-click installer for the QMK CLI

item.title: git-for-windows/build-extra
item.description: Additional files and scripts to help build Git for Windows on MSYS2.
